title: Can Jio build India's answer to Starlink?
summary: India’s largest service provider, Reliance Jio, is evaluating the development of a sovereign low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite constellation, which would challenge several global satellite broadband providers, including Starlink, Eutelsat OneWeb and Amazon’s Project LEO, among others.
